prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-WBC-LG-BL-2 Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Durable Waterproof Backpack Cover Description: This Backpack Cover is ideal for taking along hikes, camping, fishing, boating, and other outdoor activities. It is constructed of a durable waterproof polyester material to keep your backpack dry. The draw string closure will make sure your contents remain dry even during a torrential downpour.

The cover measures in at 44" in length and 34" wide, so it should cover most standard sized backpacks. Don't go hiking or camping without one of these. Search Terms: camping travel outdoors hiking backpacking Features: - Dimensions: 44" x 34" - Color: Blue - Durable Waterproof Polyester Material - Draw String Closure - Covers Standard Sized Backpacks === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 44x34 Blue Waterproof Backpack Cover

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Blue Waterproof Backpack Cover

anthropic.title_differentiation: Durable Waterproof Polyester, Draw String Closure, Fits Standard Backpacks, Hiking And Camping

openai.title_differentiation: 44" X 34", Waterproof Polyester, Draw String Closure, Fits Standard Backpacks, Ideal For Hiking Camping And Boating
